install_tell: pip install deeplake && deeplake create hub://org/dataset
misconfig_patterns: Embedded mode: no listener — exposure is object-storage ACL (S3/GCS/local), not a port
hub:// public datasets readable without ACTIVELOOP_TOKEN
Local filesystem mode: world-readable dataset directories

active_probe.false_positive_check: Hub API only — no self-hosted listener in standard deployment; Shodan-dark

deployment_tells: Embedded/cloud-only — no self-hosted HTTP listener in standard use
Data exposure via misconfigured S3 bucket containing .deeplake directories
Hub API at app.activeloop.ai — requires token for private datasets
pivot_paths: S3 bucket scan for .deeplake/ prefix → direct tensor file access
